name: NB Global Monthly Income Fund Ltd GBP
summary: NB Global Monthly Income Fund Ltd GBP is a closed-ended investment company that aims to provide investors with a high level of income, with a secondary objective of capital appreciation, by investing primarily in a diversified portfolio of debt securities and other income-producing assets globally. The fund is managed by Neuberger Berman Investment Advisers LLC and is listed on the London Stock Exchange. The company is based in Guernsey.
